productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Blue Winter Printed Top
description: CompositionGreyish blue top made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, has a boat neckline, tapered three-fourth sleeves and contoured panel on the front with a distressed look photographic printWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryPerfect on style and great in comfort, this knit top from united colors of benetton makes for a great casual wear. The tapered sleeves create a feel of casual comfort, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans and sandals and ooze style.Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'.8 and chest 33") is wearing a size M
